name: datasole
description: High-performance, binary-framed, realtime full-stack TypeScript framework with Web Worker transport, JSON Patch state sync, and pluggable backends.

scripts.build: rollup -c rollup.config.mjs && npm run build:types && tsx build/print-build-summary.ts
scripts.build:demos: npm --prefix demos/vanilla run build && npm --prefix demos/react-express run build && npm --prefix demos/vue-nestjs run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:demos
scripts.test:e2e:run: env -u NO_COLOR DATASOLE_UPDATE_SCREENSHOTS=1 npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:debug: npm run build && env -u NO_COLOR npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.config.ts --headed --debug
scripts.test:e2e:demos:run: env -u NO_COLOR DATASOLE_UPDATE_SCREENSHOTS=1 npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.demos.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:demos: npm run build && npm run build:demos && npm run test:e2e:demos:run
scripts.test:bench:run: env -u NO_COLOR npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.bench.config.ts
scripts.test:bench: npm run build && npm run test:bench:run
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist/ reports/ coverage/ docs-site/dist/ docs/.vitepress/cache/ test/e2e/reports/ test-results/
scripts.install:demos: npm --prefix demos/vanilla ci && npm --prefix demos/react-express ci && npm --prefix demos/vue-nestjs ci
scripts.verify:nonperf: npm run clean && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run build:all && npm run test -- --coverage && npm run test:e2e:run && npm run test:e2e:demos:run
scripts.verify:full: DATASOLE_WRITE_DOCS_SCREENSHOTS=1 npm run verify:nonperf && npm run test:bench:run && npm run docs:build && npm run collect-metrics
scripts.gate: npm run verify:nonperf && npm run gate:summary
scripts.gate:full: npm run verify:full && npm run gate:summary
scripts.gate:bench: env -u NO_COLOR npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.bench.config.ts
scripts.upgrade-all: ncu -u && npm install && for d in demos/vanilla demos/react-express demos/vue-nestjs; do echo "--- $d ---" && (cd $d && ncu -u --reject datasole && npm install); done
scripts.prepare: husky && npx playwright install chromium || true

author: Mayank Lahiri <mlahiri@gmail.com>
